name: @vibe-engineer/observability
description: Harness-core typed observability abstraction (DL-23): Pino structured logging + OpenTelemetry tracing/metrics + canonical UUID v4 correlation + W3C propagation + DL-22 redaction integration + local capture/test exporters.
